sentences.target: On traverse la plaine ce matin.

translations.fr: On traverse la plaine ce matin.
translations.en: We're crossing the plain this morning.
translations.es: Estamos cruzando la llanura esta mañana.
translations.de: Wir überqueren heute Morgen die Ebene.
translations.it: Stiamo attraversando la pianura questa mattina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今天早上穿过平原。
translations.pt: Estamos atravessando a planície esta manhã.
translations.vi: Sáng nay chúng tôi đang băng qua đồng bằng.
translations.nl: We steken vanmorgen de vlakte over.
translations.hi: आज सुबह हम मैदान पार कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Διασχίζουμε την πεδιάδα σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Vi krysser sletten i dag tidlig.
translations.sv: Vi korsar slätten nu på morgonen.
translations.da: Vi krydser sletten her til morgen.
translations.ja: 今朝、平原を横切っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun (3rd person singular, indefinite/colloquial ‘we’); subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with ‘On’.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘plaine’.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of ‘traverse’.
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘matin’ to mark a specific time.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial.

sentences.target: La plaine est belle après la pluie.
sentences.reading: /la plɛn ɛ bɛl apʁɛ la plɥi/

translations.fr: La plaine est belle après la pluie.
translations.ipa: /la plɛn ɛ bɛl apʁɛ la plɥi/
translations.en: The plain is beautiful after the rain.
translations.es: La llanura está hermosa después de la lluvia.
translations.de: Die Ebene ist nach dem Regen schön.
translations.it: La pianura è bella dopo la pioggia.
translations.pt: A planície fica bonita depois da chuva.
translations.vi: Đồng bằng đẹp sau cơn mưa.
translations.nl: De vlakte is mooi na de regen.
translations.hu: A síkság szép az eső után.
translations.hi: बारिश के बाद मैदान खूबसूरत लगता है.
translations.el: Η πεδιάδα είναι όμορφη μετά τη βροχή.
translations.ja: 雨上がりの平原は美しい。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘plaine’.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective, feminine singular; agrees with ‘plaine’.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement (‘après la pluie’).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘pluie’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘après’ (temporal complement).

sentences.target: Tu prends des photos de la plaine.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɑ̃ de fɔto də la plɛn/

translations.fr: Tu prends des photos de la plaine.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɑ̃ de fɔto də la plɛn/
translations.en: You're taking photos of the plain.
translations.es: Estás sacando fotos de la llanura.
translations.de: Du machst Fotos von der Ebene.
translations.pt: Você está tirando fotos da planície.
translations.vi: Bạn đang chụp ảnh đồng bằng.
translations.nl: Je maakt foto's van de vlakte.
translations.hi: तुम मैदान की तस्वीरें ले रहे हो.
translations.ja: あなたは平原を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative 2nd person singular; governs direct object ‘des photos’.
Indefinite plural article; determiner of ‘photos’.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of ‘prends’.
Preposition introducing a noun complement specifying content/theme.
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘plaine’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘de’.

sentences.target: J'aime marcher dans la plaine le soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒɛm maʁʃe dɑ̃ la plɛn lə swaʁ/

translations.fr: J'aime marcher dans la plaine le soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒɛm maʁʃe dɑ̃ la plɛn lə swaʁ/
translations.en: I like walking in the plain in the evening.
translations.es: Me gusta caminar por la llanura al atardecer.
translations.de: Ich gehe abends gerne über die Ebene.
translations.it: Mi piace camminare nella pianura la sera.
translations.ko: 저는 저녁에 평원에서 걷는 것을 좋아해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我喜欢傍晚在平原上散步。
translations.yue: 我鍾意喺黃昏喺平原度散步。
translations.ru: Мне нравится гулять по равнине вечером.
translations.pt: Gosto de caminhar pela planície ao entardecer.
translations.vi: Tôi thích đi bộ trên đồng bằng vào buổi tối.
translations.nl: Ik houd ervan om 's avonds over de vlakte te lopen.
translations.uk: Мені подобається гуляти по рівнині ввечері.
translations.hi: मुझे शाम को मैदान में टहलना पसंद है.
translations.el: Μου αρέσει να περπατάω στην πεδιάδα το βράδυ.
translations.nb: Jeg liker å gå på sletten om kvelden.
translations.id: Saya suka berjalan di dataran pada sore hari.
translations.sv: Jag tycker om att promenera på slätten på kvällen.
translations.ro: Îmi place să merg pe câmpie seara.
translations.cs: Líbí se mi večer procházet se po pláni.
translations.da: Jeg kan godt lide at gå på sletten om aftenen.
translations.ja: 夕方に平原を歩くのが好きです.

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun elided before a vowel; 1st person singular subject of ‘aime’.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; takes an infinitival complement ‘marcher’.
Infinitive verb functioning as a complement (infinitival clause) of ‘aime’.
Preposition introducing a locative complement (‘dans la plaine’).
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner of ‘plaine’.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition ‘dans’ (location).
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of ‘soir’ forming a temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of a temporal NP functioning as an adverbial (‘le soir’).
